response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with a focus on open-source contributions, but his background lacks direct commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing/tiling pipelines. His geospatial work (e.g., GISCollective) and systems-level contributions (e.g., Dlang, low-latency apps) align partially with the role, though his recent focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling may require ramp-up on core technical requirements.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with open-source contributions in mapping platforms.
Proven systems-level expertise (Dlang, low-latency apps, distributed systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby).
Strong problem-solving and experimentation mindset (workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and cross-stack adaptability).
concerns: No explicit commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing/tiling pipelines (primary languages for the role).
Recent work heavily favors TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling, diverging from core technical needs.
Lacks direct experience with navigation guidance QA or real-time traffic integration, key responsibilities.
